---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, gssoc
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.
e.g. "I wish I could pass my own CSV file via command line instead of editing the code."

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like to see added.

## Alternative Approaches
Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional Context
Add any mockups, examples, or references that would help explain the idea.
